identity: Bald human male monk, shaven head, serene calm face, clean-shaven, warm brown eyes, lightly tanned skin, compact muscular build.
outfit: Orange-and-ochre simple layered robes tied with a wide cream sash, bare arms, wooden prayer beads on one wrist, barefoot. A short cape of saffron cloth.
weapons: None. Bare fists held in a martial-arts guard are his weapon.
attackStyle: East-facing. Mid-forward-kick, right leg extended in a high snap kick, left fist cocked at the chin. Robes flare. CRITICAL: character must be MID-STRIKE, clearly in motion — weapon in the middle of a swing, thrust, shot, or spell-cast, NOT an idle/battle-ready stance. Pose must be visually distinct from the east idle.
spellStyle: East-facing. Both hands pressed together palm-to-palm at chest, a sphere of soft gold-white ki-energy glowing between them.
blockStyle: East-facing. Arms up in a forearm-guard, both fists closed at head level. Crouched stance.
koStyle: East-facing, seated in a slumped lotus position, head bowed, hands resting on knees.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm martial idle. Bare fists held in a low martial guard at the hips. Serene expression.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Shaven head, serene face, orange robe + cream sash visible at shoulders.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Bald human male monk, shaven head, serene calm face, clean-shaven, warm brown eyes, lightly tanned skin, compact muscular build.

OUTFIT: Orange-and-ochre simple layered robes tied with a wide cream sash, bare arms, wooden prayer beads on one wrist, barefoot. A short cape of saffron cloth.

WEAPONS: None. Bare fists held in a martial-arts guard are his weapon.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Bald human male monk, shaven head, serene calm face, clean-shaven, warm brown eyes, lightly tanned skin, compact muscular build.

OUTFIT: Orange-and-ochre simple layered robes tied with a wide cream sash, bare arms, wooden prayer beads on one wrist, barefoot. A short cape of saffron cloth.

WEAPONS: None. Bare fists held in a martial-arts guard are his weapon.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Shaven head, serene face, orange robe + cream sash visible at shoulders.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
